## Validation

- [ ] Relevant tests pass
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Browser or device QA completed when applicable
- [ ] Security, privacy, migration, and RLS impact reviewed when applicable
- [ ] No secrets or sensitive data added

### Evidence

List commands, results, screenshots, recordings, or traces.

## Architecture and governance

- [ ] Existing ADRs and architecture boundaries are respected
- [ ] New architectural decisions are documented
- [ ] Issue acceptance criteria are satisfied
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed

## Risks and rollback

Describe remaining risks and how to revert or disable the change.

## Remaining work

Link follow-up issues. Do not leave untracked TODOs.
